message: agent2: implementing feat(types) hash_sha256 in outlines/types/__init__.py (adding new type, following pattern of existing regex types like ISBN/UUID). Should be additive only, low collision risk.
agent1: implementing feat(types): add 'ssn' type in outlines/types/__init__.py, right after the isbn type definition. Should be a small addition, will not touch other parts of the file unless needed.

agent2: added hash_sha256 right after isbn in outlines/types/__init__.py (2-line addition, no other changes). If your ssn type also goes right after isbn, order may differ between our patches but should merge fine since both are pure additions.
